MINI MINUTES: REAL PARTIES IN INTEREST DOUGLAS PERLSTADT AND LORI PERLSTADT'S MOTION FOR NEW TRIAL:
APPEARANCE: CLIFFORD FRIED, 552-8230 FOR PLTF; D. SCOTT DICKEY, 554-4674 FOR DEFT; ROBERT DEVRISS, 456-5100 FOR REAL PARTIES IN INTEREST.
RULING: AGRUED, TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. (MOTION FOR NEW TRIAL DENIED. MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT DENIED.) MOTION PURSUANT TO CCP473 IS DENIED. MR. DEVRISS TO PREPARE ORDER. (302/AJR/PB) REPORTER: PATRICIC EVEZICH, CSR#1193

Ntc Of Petitioners' Mtn For Judgment And For Fees And Costs
Off Calendar Nov-18-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PETITIONERS THE BLAINE FAMILY TRUST and THE TIMOTHY M. BLAINE and KATHLEEN T. FRIEDRICH REVOCABLE TRUST Motion For Judgment And For Fees And Costs:
APPEAR: Clifford E. Fried, Esq. 552-8230 for petitioners & moving parties; Rafal Ofierski, Deputy City Atty 554-4700 for respondent & opposing party.
RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling (COURT GRANTS FEES OF $7,500.00 PLUS COSTS PLUS JUDGMENT ON RENT. DECISION OF RENT BOARD NOT SUPPORTED BY FAIR OR SUBSTANTIAL REASON SEE AMERICAN PRESIDENT LINES VS. ZOLIN (1995) 38CAL.APP.4TH 910, 934) without prejudice to come back to request additional fees. Order signed in open court. (302/AJR/PB) Court Reporter Patricia M. Evezich, CSR #1193

Ntc Of Petitioners' Mtn For Judgment And For Fees And Costs

Osc Re Writ Of Mandamus
Off Calendar Aug-22-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEAR: Clifford E. Fried, Esq. 552-8230 for petitioners & moving parties; K. Scott Dickey, Deputy City Atty 554-4674 for respondent & opposing party.
RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling (PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDAMUS GRANTED. TENANT CAN ONLY HAVE ONE RENTAL UNIT AS PRINCIPAL PLACE OF OCCUPANCY UNDER RENT ORDINANCE REGULATION). Petitioner to prepare order. (AJR/PB)
